summary: Tested 404 page (NotFound404) redesign with Precision Craft design system. All core requirements pass except one issue: mobile sticky bar should NOT appear on 404 page but it does.

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile sticky bar (Book/Call buttons) appears on 404 page but should NOT per requirements
ui_bugs.suggested_fix: Add 404 page detection to excludedPaths - detect by checking if current path matches no route

action_items: Fix StickyCTA.jsx to hide mobile sticky bar on 404 page - the excludedPaths array only excludes '/thank-you-booking' but 404 page (wildcard route) should also be excluded
critical_code_review_comments: StickyCTA.jsx needs logic to detect 404 page (wildcard route) and hide the mobile sticky bar. Options: 1) Pass a prop from App.js, 2) Create a context, 3) Detect known routes
context_for_next_testing_agent: 404 page tests pass except mobile sticky bar issue. All hero elements, Popular Pages cards (9), footer, SEO meta tags, noindex, card navigation verified working. Ghost 404 text, eyebrow, H1, CTAs, phone link all correct.
tests_passed: SEO title 'Page Not Found | FixitBay LLC' correct
noindex meta tag present (robots: noindex, follow)
Hero: giant ghost '404' text visible (180px desktop, 100px mobile)
Hero: H1 'Looks Like Something Needs Fixing' present
Popular Pages: 9 cards present in 3-col grid
Card navigation verified (clicked All Services → navigated to /services)
No emojis on page (card icons use first letter)
tests_failed: NO mobile sticky bar on 404 page - FAILED: mobile sticky bar (Book/Call) appears at bottom on mobile view
